meta.title: PyPTO Skill Reviewer Rules
meta.description: Single source of truth for all 47 review rules across 9 dimensions

sources.title: Anthropic Blog: Complete Guide to Building Skills
The Complete Guide to Building Skills (PDF)

rules.rule: SKILL.md 必须以由 `---` 分隔的 frontmatter 块开头
rules.check_strategy: Parse first line for `---` and find matching closing `---` on its own line

rules.rule: `name` 字段必须存在、非空、为 kebab-case 且长度 ≤64 字符
rules.check_strategy: Parse frontmatter, validate with regex ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$, strip quotes, check length

rules.rule: `description` 字段必须存在且长度 ≥20 字符
rules.check_strategy: Extract description supporting multiline syntax (> and |), check length after trimming

rules.rule: `name` 值应与 skill 目录名一致
rules.check_strategy: Compare name field with basename(skill_dir), case-insensitive

rules.rule: `description` 不应超过 1024 字符
rules.check_strategy: Count characters after multiline merge

rules.rule: frontmatter 应仅包含已知字段（name, description, license, compatibility, metadata）
rules.check_strategy: Compare all keys against known_frontmatter_fields whitelist

rules.rule: `description` 必须同时回答“做什么”和“何时使用”
rules.check_strategy: Semantic analysis of description content for purpose and trigger conditions

rules.rule: `description` 应包含用户自然会说出的触发短语
rules.check_strategy: Check for natural language phrases that match user intent patterns

rules.rule: `description` 应以结果为导向，而不是功能罗列
rules.check_strategy: Evaluate whether description focuses on outcomes vs listing capabilities

rules.rule: 若存在 `allowed-tools`，其格式必须正确；布尔字段必须为合法取值
rules.check_strategy: Check only when field exists: allowed-tools as comma-separated list, booleans as true/false

rules.rule: SKILL.md 不得超过 600 行
rules.check_strategy: Count total lines including frontmatter, threshold=600

rules.rule: SKILL.md 正文不得超过 6000 词
rules.check_strategy: Count words in body (after frontmatter) using whitespace splitting, threshold=6000

rules.rule: 不得包含 TODO/FIXME/HACK 占位符（代码块内除外）
rules.check_strategy: Line-by-line scan tracking code block open/close state, skip content inside code blocks

rules.rule: 各章节之间不得存在冗余重复内容
rules.check_strategy: Semantic analysis for repeated instructions or duplicated paragraphs across sections

rules.rule: skill 目录名必须为 kebab-case 且长度 ≤64 字符
rules.check_strategy: Validate basename with regex ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$

rules.rule: 大型内容块（>100 行参考材料）应放在 references/ 中
rules.check_strategy: Count non-code-block text segments length, flag if >100 lines of quoted/reference material inline

rules.rule: 引用路径应使用相对路径
rules.check_strategy: Extract Markdown link targets, exclude URLs and code block content, check for absolute paths

rules.rule: 被引用的文件路径必须真实存在
rules.check_strategy: Resolve relative paths from skill directory, exclude URLs and anchor-only refs (#)

rules.rule: SKILL.md 应说明每个被引用文件的用途和加载时机
rules.check_strategy: Check that each referenced file has accompanying context about why and when it is loaded

rules.rule: 指令必须使用祈使语气，而非被动建议式表达
rules.check_strategy: Scan for passive voice patterns and convert to imperative form suggestions

rules.rule: 避免使用含糊措辞（如 'consider'、'you might'、'perhaps'）
rules.check_strategy: Scan for hedging words and suggest definitive alternatives

rules.rule: 代码块必须正确闭合
rules.check_strategy: Track ``` open/close pairs, support language-annotated fences

rules.rule: 指令应解释“为什么”，而不仅是“做什么”
rules.check_strategy: Check for instructions that lack rationale or justification

rules.rule: 每个步骤都应具备可验证的成功标准
rules.check_strategy: Check workflow steps for explicit success/completion indicators

rules.rule: 命令和路径必须具体且可执行
rules.check_strategy: Check for placeholder commands or unresolved path variables

rules.rule: 所有提及的操作都必须提供具体实现方法
rules.check_strategy: Identify action references without corresponding implementation details. Skill invocations (e.g., 'use xxx-skill to...') do not require parameter details as AI handles skill calls automatically.

rules.rule: 完成标准必须明确定义
rules.check_strategy: Check for explicit definition of what constitutes task completion

rules.rule: 必须定义清晰的分步工作流
rules.check_strategy: Check for numbered/ordered steps or clear sequential workflow

rules.rule: 工作流步骤之间必须顺畅衔接
rules.check_strategy: Check that outputs of one step connect to inputs of the next

rules.rule: 必须包含错误处理或失败恢复说明
rules.check_strategy: Check for error/failure/fallback handling in workflow

rules.rule: 条件分支必须清晰描述每条路径
rules.check_strategy: Check if/else/when conditions have all branches specified

rules.rule: 应采用渐进披露模式（入口摘要 → 正文细节 → 参考深度）
rules.check_strategy: Check document structure for layered information architecture

rules.rule: 验证逻辑应优先使用确定性脚本
rules.check_strategy: Check if verification tasks use scripts rather than relying solely on LLM judgment

rules.rule: 不得嵌入密钥、凭据或敏感数据
rules.check_strategy: Scan with high-precision patterns: sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}, ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}, AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}, -----BEGIN.*PRIVATE KEY-----, password\s*[:=]\s*['"][^'"]{8,}. Exclude code block examples

rules.rule: 不得硬编码绝对路径（用户目录路径）
rules.check_strategy: Scan for /home/, /Users/, /root/ paths. Exclude /usr/bin/env, /dev/null, URLs, code block examples

rules.rule: 不得在 SKILL.md 中内联大型数据块（>50 行）
rules.check_strategy: Check code block lengths, only flag JSON/YAML/XML/CSV blocks >50 lines

rules.rule: frontmatter 中不得包含 XML 标签
rules.check_strategy: Scan frontmatter region only for <[a-zA-Z] pattern

rules.rule: 不得使用 Windows 风格路径
rules.check_strategy: Scan for C:\ or D:\ patterns, exclude code blocks

rules.rule: Python 脚本必须具有有效语法
rules.check_strategy: Use py_compile.compile() to check, report SyntaxError with line number

rules.rule: 脚本必须包含 shebang 行
rules.check_strategy: Check first line for #! in .py/.sh/.bash files

rules.rule: 脚本路径必须可移植
rules.check_strategy: Same absolute path scanning as R35 exclusion logic applied to script files

rules.rule: 脚本应包含基础错误处理
rules.check_strategy: Check for try/except blocks, error reporting, and non-zero exit codes on failure

rules.rule: 子目录结构应使用标准命名
rules.check_strategy: Compare subdirectory names against standard set: references, scripts, templates, assets, examples

rules.rule: `description` 不得包含如 `<xxx>` 的尖括号占位符
rules.check_strategy: Scan description field for <[a-zA-Z][^>]*> patterns that indicate unresolved placeholders

rules.rule: 同一文件内不得有重复的章节标题
rules.check_strategy: Collect all Markdown headings (## and ###), flag exact duplicates with line numbers

rules.rule: 围栏代码块应带有语言标注
rules.check_strategy: Check opening ``` lines for a language identifier after the fence marker

rules.rule: 提供多个选项时，应给出默认推荐
rules.check_strategy: Identify sections offering choices/alternatives and check for a recommended default
